subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Cause of God! Be thou not perturbed by the calumnies of the indolent, nor dismayed by the prattle of the crows of autumn [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من ثبت فی امرالله از مفتریات اهل فتور مگدر مشو و از اراجیف زاغان خریف
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @chastisement and requital, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
